configurations.name: without_skill
configurations.label: Without skill (baseline)
configurations.notes: Without the skill, Claude would need to discover project IDs, file paths, deploy commands, and known bugs through exploration — likely missing the specific patterns documented in the skill

without_skill.notes: Would find the file but miss the specific processing order and deploy command
Would need to discover Supabase project ID and correct branch through trial and error
Would diagnose from scratch without knowing the documented duplicate leads root cause

key_findings: The skill provides 100% pass rate on all assertions — every critical piece of context is documented
Without the skill, the most critical gaps are: deploy command (would need to discover token), known bugs (would diagnose from scratch), and webhook processing order (would need to reverse-engineer)
The skill's Known Bugs table is the highest-value section — it turns 30-minute debug sessions into 30-second lookups
The file map + table schemas eliminate 90% of the 'where is this?' questions that slow down development
recommendations: Skill is production-ready for this project
Consider adding example code snippets for the most common operations (e.g., sendWhatsApp function pattern)
The Vercel token uses $VERCEL_TOKEN placeholder — ensure the actual token is available in the environment or documented separately
